content:
INDEPENDENT AUDiTOR’S REPORT
AND
FiNANCiAL STATEMENTS
30 JUNE 2023
DEVELOPMENT BANK OF ETHIOPIA
Your Development partner!

INDEPENDENT AUDiTOR’S REPORT
AND
FiNANCiAL STATEMENTS
30 JUNE 2023
DEVELOPMENT BANK OF ETHIOPIA
Your Development partner!

The image features a black and white poster promoting a financial statement for the month of June 2021. The poster is covered with green and white colors, making the title "Independent Auditor's Report and Financial statements" stand out at the top. The date "30 June 2023" is displayed at the bottom of the poster, indicating the month and year being featured. The poster seems to be made for an educational purpose, and the message is primarily in black letters. It lacks any accompanying images, but the use of green and white color scheme makes the subject matter easily noticeable and appealing to the audience.

The document appears to be an account book or summary file about the operations of a local or national bank's auditor or auditor of company. This document contains statements about the development bank of Kenya, the local and international auditing standards and the financial statements for the year 2014. The content of the document seems to be well organized, making it an informative piece of paperwork. The document is neatly handwritten and features a logo that may be found on bank merchandise or official documents as a sign of authenticity.

The image shows a report titled "Annual report: Commercial banks of Ethiopia". The report was done in the year "2023/24", but the specific year is not clearly marked. This report, a part of a report book, seems to be a significant financial document produced by a bank in its home country. A report book contains financial reports and forecasts of its home country's financial situation, which can include details about the banking system, credit ratings, bank equity and reserves, and other monetary and financial indicators.

The image shows a book or flyer for Digital Banking Forward. It has a striking design featuring a cityscape with buildings and a bridge over water. There is the company's name above the skyline, highlighting their digital banking solution. The background also includes a cell phone with a wallet attached to it. This design is intended to attract attention and reflect the modern financial trends of the modern world. The cover's purple background complements the blue sky, adding to the overall aesthetic.

The image features a page from a press release. The cover of the press release is predominantly green with black lettering, and it displays the title "Indecent Auditor's Report and Financial Statements. June 2023: 30 June 2023". The press release is presented in three parts, and the first line from the press release reads: "Indecent Auditor's Report & Financial Statements. [Jun 20 23]." Below the main press release title in the top left corner, there is a summary in the middle part of the press release, and in the middle right part of the press release, a date: "30 June 2023."

The image features a report about the African Bank of Vienna's Commercial Bank of Ethiopia. The report is displayed on a poster with an eye-catching design featuring yellow, black, and pink colors and is framed by diamond shapes. The title of the report is "Annual Report", with a date of "2023/24" accompanying it.

The image features a poster showcasing digital banking and mobile phones. There are five cell phones on the poster, placed at various positions. One of the phones has a purple color and is located towards the top left corner of the image, another is slightly to the left of the central phone. To the right of each phone, there is a logo. A purple and gold logo can be seen on the central cell phone, and the center phone has a more prominent purple logo. The middle phone has a striking yellow logo.

The advertisement features the title "Independent Auditor's Report" printed on a white background. Below the title is a green border, and the date is written in black text, followed by "30 June 2023." The poster is designed as a square, with a border that is green and white, featuring the text "Your Development Partner" in black text at the top. In the bottom left corner of the poster, the words "DEVELOPMENT BANK OF ethiopia" and the words "Development Bank of ethiopia" appear in black text. The entire poster is set against a brown background, highlighting the green border, which contains the black text throughout.

The image shows a business card with a document attached to it. The card is white in color and has a cover page that says "Development Bank of Eritrea International Auditing And Financial Statements". Below this, there is a text box containing key information about an auditing service provided by the Development Bank of Eritrea. (A statement of cash flows). The other page is blank. It appears this business card is meant to provide the Development Bank of Eritrea with important details of its auditing service, including financial statements and an accompanying cover page displaying the key information.

The image shows a blank document with three stapled copies of the page numbers. The document appears to be a report or contract, possibly from a bank. The page numbers are arranged in a row, with the first page number closest to the top and the third page number farthest from the top. This arrangement makes it easy to identify the order of the page numbers.

Based on the text "Information: Invoice no. FH-9F43Z", it seems to be a bill, possibly for a specific product being sold. The bill is addressed to someone in the Official Service Corporation of South Africa Bank (OSBCA) and is printed on certified mail. This suggests that it is a formal document and is legally binding. The page is neatly written and signed by someone, which indicates that it may be a request with certain terms and conditions.

The document appears to be a letter written with a distinctive purple ink stamp in the center. It is slightly open at the top portion, giving the impression that someone has sent, signed, or addressed it at the bottom left corner. The content of the letter seems to provide guidance or instructions, with the inclusion of terms and figures, suggesting it may be a report or an instructional message.

Some of the contents are presented in a table format, providing detailed information or explanations. Overall, the letter serves as a communication method or message, emphasizing clarity and organization.

The image shows a page filled with a lot of information, which appears to be attached to a letter. The letter itself is quite large and positioned at the top of the page, dominating most of the space. The white background of the paper further emphasizes the white text, making the information easier to read and comprehend. There are no clear details or indicators of a stamp in the image, so it is not evident if this is a letter from a bank, a government authority, or any other organization. The contents of the letter are not described in detail outside the frame of the document.

In the image, a piece of paper is shown, but the most notable content is a letter enclosed inside another envelope. This letter is addressed to someone who is not present and seems to have a close connection, such as a mother or a caretaker. The author of the letter states that the purpose of the letter in question is to be sent for ethical means, highlighting the need for attention to detail and a sense of morality.

The enclosed letter and the envelope itself are of uniform size, but different fonts are used within the envelope. The person reading the letter might be expecting an explanation or an explanation of a kind.

The document, labeled as a "sheet of paper," contains a list of procedures and a list of tasks. It appears to be a detailed charter or registration, possibly for some kind of business or project. The paper has a page at the bottom left corner, and a section with several lines in purple colors. The text "DEVELOPER'S OFFICE OF THE MUDD'ARS FOR ALLERTY BUSINESSES" is also presented on the paper, possibly indicating the name or affiliation of the registered agents.

The document seen on the paper appears to be a bill, list, agreement or contract among the involved parties. The presence of an envelope with the letters "D" and "C" suggests that it could possibly be a construction or company document.

This image shows a sheet of paper being inspected or signed by someone with their name and signature, along with a few dots of ink. Multiple stamps are visible as well, suggesting that the document could be official or legal in nature and requires attention to detail or an approval by a superior.
 
 The person's signature indicates that they have reviewed, approved, or signed the document, which may be crucial or important, such as a contract, agreement or legal document. The presence of multiple stamps shows a sense of organization and that the document may involve multiple parties or need to be approved by multiple superior authority figures, emphasizing its significance or the need for legal documentation.
 
 The image appears to be taken in a formal setting, as the document is inspected by an authority figure with a signature of their own, indicating that the document is probably subject to strict regulations, review, or agreement before it can be rendered public or accepted.

The image shows a financial statement paper from the Development Bank of Ethiopia printed in a green and cream color theme. The title of the paper, "Independent Auditor's Report and Financial Statements", is printed with the date "30 June 2021". The paper appears to be a report detailing the contents of the Statement of Financial Position or Balance Sheet. It is a comprehensive documentation of the financial position of the organization, including key figures such as Chief Engineer, Chief Officer, and Finance Officer, all included in its financial statements.

The document is titled "Development Bank of Eritrea - Independent Audits Report - And Financial Statements". It shows that the focus on this report has been set by the Development Bank of Eritrea, which seems to be an independent body. The report appears to be completed by January of the following year. The bank is involved in independent auditing projects to provide accurate financial information for development partners, ensuring transparency and the proper use of resources.

The image features a document or sheet of paper sitting on a table, accompanied by three unique, circular postage stamps. The stamps bear a close-up view, with one stamp featuring a person and another stamp showcasing a star. It's likely that these postage stamps might be used for mail sending purposes. The document itself appears to be a list of development topics, which suggests that it is likely used to provide information about a certain topic or theme.

An envelope or paper mail addressed to the President of the Author's Board is addressed to "Inconsiderate Behavior". It is clear that this is a formal letter. The President will receive the letter within the next month. The letter is intended for an Author's Association, who are members of the Author's Board and are the sponsors of the organization. The content of the letter is directed towards someone named "Insurer," and the letter mentions that the address may be sent to someone with a U.S. address, implying that the president is in residence in the United States.

An informational letter written in purple ink and dated as the day of the signing of the Agreement, written in elegant cursive font, which discusses the provisions and implementation of the Agreement. There are two drafts of the Document, and it is signed at the bottom of the page.

The image shows a white piece of paper lying on the floor. The paper appears to be of a white color, and it has been placed on the floor. Since it is not clearly connected to any text, we cannot determine what the image is attempting to convey. The context of the image may provide a hint, but further information would be needed to understand the exact purpose of the paper on the floor.

The image shows a letter written out neatly on a piece of paper that is placed on top of a gray page. The letter appears to be formal in style, as it is addressed to someone with the last name Dept Treasury officials. The purpose of the letter is to provide information about an inspection or discussion related to "bank integrity issues," which includes "inspections of banks and bank credit unions," and "bank officials of finance." This type of inspection can be beneficial for ensuring responsible financial practices, fostering consumer confidence, and maintaining trust in the banking system.

The image features a white and blue document or form, possibly a menu, displayed on a white surface. It contains a list of items along with their descriptions. The details provided are not fully visible in the image, but there are items in the "pizza" and "sushi" sections. The writing in the document is written in both Vietnamese and English, and it is a thick, white page with black text that is difficult to read.

The document appears to be related to restaurants or food options or possibly a menu at a restaurant. The combination of Vietnamese and English text makes it evident that the document originates from a Vietnamese perspective.

The image shows a document that seems to be a letter, a letterhead, or a bill, set on top of a pink background. The document details the costs associated with a new public works project, likely covering expenses like transportation infrastructure and other project costs. The text on the document includes a breakdown of the costs for the project, as well as the amount allocated for transportation infrastructure. The document also mentions a project named "Development of Dufloating City and East West City Development Center South" and includes the names of individuals or officials responsible for the project. The document appears to be signed, likely by a member of the responsible entity, showcasing an authorized representation of the project.

In the image, there is a small white page, seemingly a business letter, with three different blue and purple labels on the page. These labels are often used for sealing documents, making it clear that the letter or document has been marked " Signed/Not Signed". This is often a common practice in many countries and can signify the agreement or signature of the signatories. The presence of these seals implies a formal agreement or consent, and the use of distinct designs on each document helps establish that this is a written, legally binding contract.

The paper is also a type of paper that is typically used for writing letters, and in the image, it is written in black and white. This can sometimes be difficult to read or may not be legible or easily readable, which could cause a misunderstanding or confusion regarding the content of the document.

The image is a colorful poster with an attractive design, promoting the concept of digital banking. It features a variety of products and services typically offered by a bank through digital means, including a cellphone, an app, and an electronic banking machine. The poster seems to focus on the positive aspects of digital technology in enhancing the banking experience, likely encouraging viewers to embrace this modern approach to financial services. 

The poster also includes elements representing a typical cityscape, likely to demonstrate the accessibility of these banking services in public spaces. One of the key elements of the cityscape is a building representing a bridge, which can be symbolic of connectivity and bridging distances in both urban life and digital banking.

The image shows a page from a book that has a list of important topics along with their descriptions. This information is displayed in the top left corner and occupies a large area of the page. The page appears to be well-organized, providing easy access to key concepts and knowledge. It could be used for educational purposes or helping someone understand various topics better. The format of the page resembles a book, containing multiple topics listed one after the other, making it a valuable reference tool.

The report contains a list of the company's goals and strategies, including aspects such as vision, values, and skills of the employees. These plans are aimed at motivating and inspiring the employees to work towards achieving the stated objectives. These strategies can be viewed as the core beliefs driving the company's values and how they align with the broader scope. it also includes descriptions of the products, services, and the various roles and responsibilities within the company. Overall, the report serves as a roadmap to guide the employees' understanding of the company's direction and expectations from them, as well as the overall operations and structure of the organization.

A paper is presented with a list of values presented in black text. The paper is white with brown text. There are several items, such as a bird and a bee, drawn on the paper, along with the various listed values. In total, there are eight written items in the document. It is a handout which provides a list of values that everyone should follow, aiming to promote goodwill and respect among people.

The image shows a page displaying three bar graphs that represent the outstanding balances of different securities, such as stocks and bonds, set against the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for a year. The graphs display information about the change in balances and the trends in different equity markets and bonds. The graphs show that bonds' outstanding balances have been increasing, while stocks' balances have been decreasing over the past year.

The page also includes three purple bars for the outstanding balances of stocks and three blue bars for the outstanding balances of bonds. In addition, there is a table displaying financial information, likely to help the reader better understand the graphs, and some smaller graphs that show information about equity markets.

The image displays four lines and bar charts, each with different purple colored bars. The charts represent numbers in purple. There is a purple bar on the left, a purple bar in the center, and two purple bars on the right. The charts seem to focus on the growth and progress of a fund over time, and the numbers shown are numbers related to the fund's performance.

The Board of Directors page features a group photo of five African men and four women, all dressed professionally. The group consists of five individuals, with people positioned in three rows and two columns on the page. All the individuals are standing under distinct banners or signs in front of them. It appears that the individuals are members of a board or board-like group, based on their formal attire and presence on the page.

This image displays a board of directors for an organization, consisting of six individual faces wearing business attire, including neckties and suits. The photographs are arranged in a clockwise or counter-clockwise direction and the names of the board members are displayed around them, allowing viewers to identify each individual's position on the board. 

The board members are well-dressed and positioned thoughtfully within the composition, presenting a professional image. The image is color black and white, giving it a classic and timeless appeal, and the organization seems to be established in a specific country, given that all the photographs are in that region as well.

In addition to the names of the board members and the organization's title, there is a brief description of the organization beneath them. This description could provide context or further information about the organization or the board's responsibilities and duties.

The group of five men in the image represent members of a mosque's Advisory Committee, and they are all wearing traditional Islamic headgear, indicating their affiliation with the Islamic culture. They are depicted wearing business attire, with four of them wearing suits and ties and one wearing a traditional Arab hat. All the men are facing the camera, providing a clear view of each one of them. It is a page in a document showcasing the committee members and their roles within the mosque.

The image shows an open white and green binder, most likely a report or folder, titled "Independent Auditor's Report and Financial Statements" with a green border and white background. The report is about June 2021, which can be seen under the tab labeled "30 June 2023." The contents of the report involve financial statements for the year June 2023, indicating that an independent auditor has provided this information.

The binder itself appears to be a business binder, with its structure designed in a typical format: a cover on the left that contains the title, and then sections underneath, each labeled with a date and a title, with the details located underneath them. The content of the binder is likely to be detailed in a report with financial statements, which could include bank statements, balance sheets, and income statements for a variety of companies.

The paper is a document titled "Financial statements and the Development Bank of Eritrea", released by the Development Bank of Eritrea in collaboration with the Financial Stability Programmes, showing the year 2002 and covering the period of May 10th, 2002 to May 10th, 2003. It also includes financial data for Eritrea and its bordering countries.

Two purple, circular stamps are placed on the right side of the page. They don't seem to serve any particular purpose; instead, they appear to be decorative, artistic, or artistic souvenirs. Their presence within the text does not take up any space but adds visual interest to the page, making it more aesthetically pleasing.

The image shows a page of official letterhead that includes a name card and some information about the organization. This letter suggests that the letterhead was written for one of the directors at the Organization, most likely the Executive Director of the Board of Directors, CFO, or a similar leadership position.

I am sorry for the inconvenience. The response that I have received from you would be considered as thanks for writing to us about the issues at hand. There are two responses that I can see at the moment. Firstly, a letter is being sent back to the writer and the second is the writer's initial response.

The image shows an important document that includes the name of the Government Bank of Malawi, which has a foreign name, and a list of people along with their contact information. The text seems to be in a formal format, indicating that it might be a register, register a statement or a list of responsibilities.

The document displays information about the role of the Government Bank of Malawi in financing agriculture sector projects. While the details of the individual tasks and responsibilities are not provided, the document outlines that foreign agencies and other bodies engage through the Government Bank of Malawi in support of various initiatives and endeavors in the country. The list of responsibilities also requires the inclusion of the details of the organizations involved, demonstrating that the bank plays a crucial part in international collaboration.

The image features a document, possibly a paper with a page of writings, that has been placed on a white surface. The content includes the word "Bank" followed by a few descriptions, some of which are in a foreign language. The document appears to be old and may be signed, as suggested by the presence of multiple blue and red stamps on different parts of the paper. These pens, along with the paper, point to the authenticity and importance of the writing.

In the image, there is a form page in a grey color, filled with text and seals. The seals are different colors, including purple, white, and black. Some of them look like the seal of a member of the European Parliament, while others might resemble the seal of a prime minister. The page also has some tables, which further enhance its content.

It is a long, bulging document written in the third person and includes a stamp on it, possibly a contract between organizations or a report written by the Ministry of Finance, Budget and Expenditure in Eritrea. The page looks like a page from a book, as it uses a serif font, and is of legal or official importance. There are three seals on it – one on each side.

The image provides a document that appears to be a report or a flyer about independent auditor's reports and financial statements. It is designed in an attractive and clean color scheme, featuring a mix of green and white with a bit of black text on a white background. The document is titled "30 June 2021" at the top and "Independent Auditor's Report and Financial statements" in the middle, indicating its focus on these areas. The layout is simple and well-organized, featuring clear headings and bullet points that clearly convey the content.
!"Financial Statements' And 'July - June 2005!"

The image depicts a white piece of paper with red text descriptions. There are three different colored rubber seals on the paper, two of which are purple and one is white. The seals are in the upper portion of the document. The white paper is placed on a brown background, giving the impression that it is a report or a contract.

The document appears to be a letter or note being signed by the recipient. There are three items printed on blue postage stamps, each displaying a unique shape. The contents of the letter or note can be inferred from the available information, but the letter itself is not visible in the image. The document is presented on a background that is not clearly visible, suggesting that it lies flat. Overall, the image seems to provide minimal context about the document contents or its purpose.
The document displays a letter written on a piece of paper, which is filled with various text such as descriptions and the opinions of other individuals. The letter is attached to the paper.

There is a page of writing on a sheet of white paper. It appears to be a legal document, possibly a statement or agreement that needs to be approved. However, the page itself is not legible, and it is in question whether the writing comes from a signature or even if it has been altered at all. This creates uncertainty regarding the authenticity and legibility of the document.

The image shows a piece of paper, and it appears to be a document, possibly a letter or a signed document. Various stamps are visible on the paper, such as one with the words "indranjesandkalim" and another with the words "indranjesen av rødekninger". Additionally, there is a seal or stamp on the document, and it is written in a large size. This might suggest that the document is an official, legal, or formal letter written between different government departments or entities.

The document shown appears to be a paper that may contain a list of names. As one can see, the names on the paper are placed next to each other, making it easier to see the individual names. Given its content, it seems to be a page of some sort, possibly related to a meeting, presentation, or list of duties for a group of people. Additionally, a brown envelope is also visible in the scene, positioned near the paper, which might be related to an official event or document. The image focuses on the names and page with the brown envelope, displaying the details of the people or activities associated with the paper and the envelope.

The image shows a document of some sort that appears to be an official letter or an order. The author and their signature for the document are positioned to the left and to the right of each other, respectively. The document is presented on top of a blue background, making the writing and information visible. While the exact purpose of the document isn't clear, it is most likely a form of instruction, regulation, or agreement, as it shares similarities with a common document such as a bill or a permit.

The year "2023/24" is written in black text on the cover of the financial report. This year was the third annual meeting of the Committee of the Board of Directors, as evidenced by the gold emblem on the cover. The cover is predominantly black and yellow with three distinct triangles, each representing a different year from "2023/24" to "2021/22".

There are several long tables, possibly menus or lists of features from companies, spread across the pages. However, they are not displayed in sentences. Instead, they provide details about each feature, but not any sort of text or description. The exact details of the tables are not visible, so the audience cannot fully comprehend what these tables typically include or why the tables are important.

The image shows a business vision paper posted on a wall. The paper is color-coded with yellow in the foreground and light brown in the background, separating and highlighting important sections. The paper covers a wide range of details, including key goals and the mission statement for an organization which can be applied by any individual to achieve success. It is presented in a structured manner, with information clearly labeled for easy understanding.

The image shows an object that appears to contain a detailed flow of instructions or information about a subject, possibly a guidebook or a set of instructions. The format of the document suggests that it may be part of a book or an educational platform, as it appears to address a broad topic. The object is neatly organized into multiple paragraphs, detailing various ideas, processes or methods to consider. The presence of these comprehensive instructions creates a clear and structured learning experience, making the information easily accessible and easy to understand for the intended audience.

The image showcases an excel chart on a white background displaying three different colored bars representing different years, such as January, July, and December. Each bar seems to be representing a specific sector, giving some idea about their performances. In total, eight bars are present, occupying various sections of the chart. The size of the bars range from smaller to larger, providing an easy-to-interpret and visually appealing representation of the data.

In the image, there is a report with three bars, each representing different aspects of the performance in a financial company. The bars show the comparison of the revenue, profits, and expenses over time. There are 12 bars within the report, highlighting data for three different time periods. The report also provides the top score for each category during the periods shown in the graph. The financial data suggests that the company achieved a higher performance in three years in 2016, 2015, and 2018. Additionally, it seems the expenses for these years were also much higher compared to the revenue.

Five people are captured in a group picture, and it seems to be placed in the middle of the page. They are all wearing formal black suits, and each has a similar attire. The picture is surrounded by several other black suits displayed in the center, giving off a formal and professional vibe.

The image shows a sheet of paper or a board display featuring six corporate heads or business directors. The directors include Attama Atolyayi (Naga), Iselin Yaha (Iyo-Isoya), Etna Elnourine (Phoebe), Fathalifah Iyya (Fatima), Iselyn Tololeolu (Enel), and Fumihiko "Sheppetto" Nkosi. Each individual is identified by their name and the text "Board of Directors (continued)" is added above each individual's name to indicate their position.

The names of the six individuals can be seen in different positions or orientations on the display, and the image provides context about each director, such as their titles, companies, and other relevant information.

The image shows five photographs of men in suits, all sitting in front of a purple background. These men are likely members of a higher authority, such as a council or a royalty, posing for an authority-recognition organization or a royal portrait. Each person in the group is presented in a distinct portrait, captured in various poses that highlight their stature and formality as authority figures. The image portrays a sense of honor and respect, which is symbolized through the depiction of these men among the suits and their prominent positions in society.
